title: Platform documentation sync pass
goal: Keep platform README, decisions, workstreams, and handoff docs synchronized with the implemented BSP/runtime surface.
next_actions: Find one stale platform claim by comparing docs to implementation.
Patch the stale text or add a decision entry for an intentional direction change.
acceptance: Docs describe the current implementation without overclaiming unimplemented surfaces.
Any new decision is dated and scoped.
Swarm status remains valid after the docs pass.
